title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Victory and a New Dream

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I did it! I really did it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I WON!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I lost.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I thought I got better after the pep talk you gave
me, but I guess not...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Bourbon?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That was a wonderful race. I wanted to tell you
that.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I should be able to race again soon, so let's run
together again.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! of course!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on your magnificent victory!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you. I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: McQueen and Rice both ran a fierce race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know if it would work out, but I'm glad I
was able to get out there and do my best.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text: By the way, have you decided on your next race?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hm. I think I'd like to run in another race as big as
this one.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Which means, yup, I'd really like to run in the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Good choice!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to try my hardest to win again next
time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide on the Takarazuka Kinen as
our next race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... The track is so quiet in the morning.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um... The Takarazuka Kinen is a right-handed
2,200-meter race on turf, right? So—
Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I must improve myself just as much as Rice and
Tannhauser have!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll take all my disappointment from the spring
Tenno Sho and bring it to the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow... McQueen is really something...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Okay! I've gotta work hard too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to start training for the medium-distance
G1 Takarazuka Kinen in two months!
